narrative:
Barberton 6-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,169 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.7 percentage points.
